2	/// <summary>
3	/// Internal interface for managing triggers. This interface should not be used by the Quartz client.
4	/// </summary>
5	public interface IOperableTrigger : IMutableTrigger
6	{
7	    /// <summary>
8	    /// This method should not be used by the Quartz client.
9	    /// </summary>
10	    /// <remarks>
11	    /// Called when the <see cref="IScheduler" /> has decided to 'fire'
12	    /// the trigger (Execute the associated <see cref="IJob" />), in order to
13	    /// give the <see cref="ITrigger" /> a chance to update itself for its next
14	    /// triggering (if any).
15	    /// </remarks>
16	    /// <seealso cref="JobExecutionException" />
17	    void Triggered(ICalendar? calendar);
18	
19	    /// <summary>
20	    /// This method should not be used by the Quartz client.
21	    /// </summary>
22	    /// <remarks>
23	    /// <para>
24	    /// Called by the scheduler at the time a <see cref="ITrigger" /> is first
25	    /// added to the scheduler, in order to have the <see cref="ITrigger" />
26	    /// compute its first fire time, based on any associated calendar.
27	    /// </para>
28	    ///
29	    /// <para>
30	    /// After this method has been called, <see cref="ITrigger.GetNextFireTimeUtc" />
31	    /// should return a valid answer.
32	    /// </para>
33	    /// </remarks>
34	    /// <returns>
35	    /// The first time at which the <see cref="ITrigger" /> will be fired
36	    /// by the scheduler, which is also the same value <see cref="ITrigger.GetNextFireTimeUtc" />
37	    /// will return (until after the first firing of the <see cref="ITrigger" />).
38	    /// </returns>
39	    DateTimeOffset? ComputeFirstFireTimeUtc(ICalendar? calendar);
40	
41	    /// <summary>
42	    /// This method should not be used by the Quartz client.
43	    /// </summary>
44	    /// <remarks>
45	    /// Called after the <see cref="IScheduler" /> has executed the
46	    /// <see cref="IJobDetail" /> associated with the <see cref="ITrigger" />
47	    /// in order to get the final instruction code from the trigger.
48	    /// </remarks>
49	    /// <param name="context">
50	    /// is the <see cref="IJobExecutionContext" /> that was used by the
51	    /// <see cref="IJob" />'s<see cref="IJob.Execute" /> method.</param>
52	    /// <param name="result">is the <see cref="JobExecutionException" /> thrown by the
53	    /// <see cref="IJob" />, if any (may be null).
54	    /// </param>
55	    /// <returns>
56	    /// One of the <see cref="SchedulerInstruction"/> members.
57	    /// </returns>
58	    /// <seealso cref="SchedulerInstruction.NoInstruction" />
59	    /// <seealso cref="SchedulerInstruction.ReExecuteJob" />
60	    /// <seealso cref="SchedulerInstruction.DeleteTrigger" />
61	    /// <seealso cref="SchedulerInstruction.SetTriggerComplete" />
62	    /// <seealso cref="Triggered" />
63	    SchedulerInstruction ExecutionComplete(IJobExecutionContext context, JobExecutionException? result);
64	
65	    /// <summary>
66	    /// This method should not be used by the Quartz client.
67	    /// <para>
68	    /// To be implemented by the concrete classes that extend this class.
69	    /// </para>
70	    /// <para>
71	    /// The implementation should update the <see cref="ITrigger" />'s state
72	    /// based on the MISFIRE_INSTRUCTION_XXX that was selected when the <see cref="ITrigger" />
73	    /// was created.
74	    /// </para>
75	    /// </summary>
76	    void UpdateAfterMisfire(ICalendar? cal);
77	
78	    /// <summary>
79	    /// This method should not be used by the Quartz client.
80	    /// <para>
81	    /// The implementation should update the <see cref="ITrigger" />'s state
82	    /// based on the given new version of the associated <see cref="ICalendar" />
83	    /// (the state should be updated so that it's next fire time is appropriate
84	    /// given the Calendar's new settings).
85	    /// </para>
86	    /// </summary>
87	    /// <param name="cal"> </param>
88	    /// <param name="misfireThreshold"></param>
89	    void UpdateWithNewCalendar(ICalendar cal, TimeSpan misfireThreshold);
90	
91	    /// <summary>
92	    /// Validates whether the properties of the <see cref="IJobDetail" /> are
93	    /// valid for submission into a <see cref="IScheduler" />.
94	    /// </summary>
95	    void Validate();
96	
97	    /// <summary>
98	    /// This method should not be used by the Quartz client.
99	    /// </summary>
100	    /// <remarks>
101	    /// Usable by <see cref="IJobStore" />
102	    /// implementations, in order to facilitate 'recognizing' instances of fired
103	    /// <see cref="ITrigger" /> s as their jobs complete execution.
104	    /// </remarks>
105	    string FireInstanceId { get; set; }
106	
107	    void SetNextFireTimeUtc(DateTimeOffset? value);
108	
109	    void SetPreviousFireTimeUtc(DateTimeOffset? value);
110	}
111	
112	/// <summary>
113	/// Optional trigger capabilities that will be part of <see cref="IOperableTrigger"/> in 4.x.

115	/// </summary>
116	internal interface INextVersionTrigger
117	{
118	    /// <summary>

120	    /// misfire threshold so that fire times within the threshold window are preserved.
121	    /// </summary>
122	    void UpdateAfterMisfire(ICalendar? cal, TimeSpan misfireThreshold);
123	}

23	namespace Quartz.Impl.Triggers;
24	
25	/// <summary>
26	/// The base abstract class to be extended by all triggers.
27	/// </summary>
28	/// <remarks>
29	/// <para>
30	/// <see cref="ITrigger" />s have a name and group associated with them, which
31	/// should uniquely identify them within a single <see cref="IScheduler" />.
32	/// </para>
33	///
34	/// <para>
35	/// <see cref="ITrigger" />s are the 'mechanism' by which <see cref="IJob" /> s
36	/// are scheduled. Many <see cref="ITrigger" /> s can point to the same <see cref="IJob" />,
37	/// but a single <see cref="ITrigger" /> can only point to one <see cref="IJob" />.
38	/// </para>
39	///
40	/// <para>
41	/// Triggers can 'send' parameters/data to <see cref="IJob" />s by placing contents
42	/// into the <see cref="JobDataMap" /> on the <see cref="ITrigger" />.
43	/// </para>
44	/// </remarks>
45	/// <seealso cref="ISimpleTrigger" />
46	/// <seealso cref="ICronTrigger" />
47	/// <seealso cref="IDailyTimeIntervalTrigger" />
48	/// <seealso cref="JobDataMap" />
49	/// <seealso cref="IJobExecutionContext" />
50	/// <author>James House</author>
51	/// <author>Sharada Jambula</author>
52	/// <author>Marko Lahma (.NET)</author>
53	[Serializable]
54	public abstract class AbstractTrigger : IOperableTrigger, INextVersionTrigger, IEquatable<AbstractTrigger>
55	{
56	#pragma warning disable IDE0052
57	    // We use these field to (de)serialize the Key and JobKey for backward compatibility
58	    private string name = null!;
59	    private string group = SchedulerConstants.DefaultGroup;
60	    private string jobName = null!;
61	    private string jobGroup = SchedulerConstants.DefaultGroup;
62	#pragma warning restore IDE0052
63	
64	    [NonSerialized] // we serialize this via the 'name' and 'group' fields
65	    private TriggerKey? key;
66	    [NonSerialized] // we serialize this via the 'jobName' and 'jobGroup' fields
67	    private JobKey? jobKey;
68	    private JobDataMap jobDataMap = null!;
69	
70	    private int misfireInstruction = Quartz.MisfireInstruction.InstructionNotSet;
71	
72	    private DateTimeOffset? endTimeUtc;
73	    private DateTimeOffset startTimeUtc;
74	
75	    [NonSerialized]
76	    private TimeProvider timeProvider;
77	
78	    internal TimeProvider TimeProvider => timeProvider ?? TimeProvider.System;
79	
80	    /// <summary>
81	    /// Stores the original NextFireTimeUtc before misfire handling changes it.
82	    /// Used to provide the correct ScheduledFireTimeUtc in JobExecutionContext.
83	    /// Copied by MemberwiseClone in <see cref="Clone"/> (works for RAMJobStore).
84	    /// </summary>
85	    [NonSerialized]
86	    internal DateTimeOffset? MisfiredFromFireTimeUtc;
87	
88	    /// <summary>
89	    /// Maximum elapsed time (in ms) between the time captured before UpdateAfterMisfire
90	    /// and the new fire time set by a "fire now" misfire policy. Used to distinguish
91	    /// "fire now" policies (FireOnceNow, FireNow, RescheduleNowWith*) from "reschedule
92	    /// next" policies (DoNothing, RescheduleNextWith*) where the existing code is already
93	    /// correct.
94	    /// </summary>
95	    internal const double FireNowMisfireDetectionThresholdMs = 500;
96	
97	    /// <summary>
98	    /// Gets or sets the key of the trigger.
99	    /// </summary>
100	    /// <value>The key of the trigger.</value>
101	    public TriggerKey Key
102	    {
103	        get { return key!; }
104	        set
105	        {
106	            // Update fields to ensure we remain backward compatible for serialization
107	            if (value is null)
108	            {
109	                name = null!;
110	                group = null!;
111	            }
112	            else
113	            {
114	                name = value.Name;
115	                group = value.Group;
116	            }
117	
118	            key = value;
119	        }
120	    }
121	
122	    /// <summary>
123	    /// Gets or sets the key of the job.
124	    /// </summary>
125	    /// <value>The key of the job.</value>
126	    public JobKey JobKey
127	    {
128	        get { return jobKey!; }
129	        set
130	        {
131	            // Update fields to ensure we remain backward compatibile for serialization
132	            if (value is null)
133	            {
134	                jobName = null!;
135	                jobGroup = null!;
136	            }
137	            else
138	            {
139	                jobName = value.Name;
140	                jobGroup = value.Group;
141	            }
142	
143	            jobKey = value;
144	        }
145	    }
146	
147	    public TriggerBuilder GetTriggerBuilder()
148	    {
149	        return TriggerBuilder.Create()
150	            .ForJob(JobKey)
151	            .ModifiedByCalendar(CalendarName)
152	            .UsingJobData(JobDataMap)
153	            .WithDescription(Description)
154	            .EndAt(EndTimeUtc)
155	            .WithIdentity(Key)
156	            .WithPriority(Priority)
157	            .StartAt(StartTimeUtc)
158	            .WithSchedule(GetScheduleBuilder());
159	    }
160	
161	    public abstract IScheduleBuilder GetScheduleBuilder();
162	
163	    /// <summary>
164	    /// Get or set the description given to the <see cref="ITrigger" /> instance by
165	    /// its creator (if any).
166	    /// </summary>
167	    public virtual string? Description { get; set; }
168	
169	    /// <summary>
170	    /// Get or set  the <see cref="ICalendar" /> with the given name with
171	    /// this Trigger. Use <see langword="null" /> when setting to dis-associate a Calendar.
172	    /// </summary>
173	    public virtual string? CalendarName { get; set; }
174	
175	    /// <summary>
176	    /// Get or set the <see cref="JobDataMap" /> that is associated with the
177	    /// <see cref="ITrigger" />.
178	    /// <para>
179	    /// Changes made to this map during job execution are not re-persisted, and
180	    /// in fact typically result in an illegal state.
181	    /// </para>
182	    /// </summary>
183	    public virtual JobDataMap JobDataMap
184	    {
185	        get
186	        {
187	            if (jobDataMap is null)
188	            {
189	                jobDataMap = new JobDataMap();
190	            }
191	            return jobDataMap;
192	        }
193	
194	        set => jobDataMap = value;
195	    }
196	
197	    /// <summary>

Implemented the fix for loading fire times on custom/blob triggers.

Summary:
- Updated `StdAdoDelegate.SelectTrigger` so when a trigger is loaded from `QRTZ_BLOB_TRIGGERS`, Quartz now applies the `NEXT_FIRE_TIME` and `PREV_FIRE_TIME` values from `QRTZ_TRIGGERS` via:
  - `trigger.SetNextFireTimeUtc(nextFireTimeUtc)`
  - `trigger.SetPreviousFireTimeUtc(previousFireTimeUtc)`
- Also preserves `MisfiredFromFireTimeUtc` for blob/custom triggers when present, matching the non-blob path behavior.

Validation:
- Added a temporary regression test that reproduced the issue: blob/custom triggers loaded with default/null fire times despite DB values.
- Confirmed the temporary test failed before the fix and passed after the fix.
- Removed the temporary test as requested.
- Ran an existing related unit test successfully:
  - `TestSelectBlobTriggerWithNoBlobContent`

Only source change remaining:
- `src/Quartz/Impl/AdoJobStore/StdAdoDelegate.Triggers.cs`

No commits were made.
